description: Lifecycle vocabulary for Assertion. Eight states: candidate (pre-admission, non-crypto-bearing) + admitted | superseded | challenged | revoked | forgotten | escrow | archived (post-admission, crypto-bearing).

anyOf.description: Pre-admission; not yet signed. The only NON-crypto-bearing variant.
Signed and accepted into the assertion store.
Replaced by a newer admitted assertion; original signatures preserved.
Under formal challenge; signatures still meaningful for audit.
Invalidated by sanction; original signatures preserved for audit chain.
Subject of a ForgetRecord; references forget_record_id (A2 manifest entry).
Awaiting reveal / unsealing; signatures present but content covered.
Moved to cold storage; signatures preserved for provenance.
